title: Rank Customers By Spending
description: Rank customers based on their total spending in descending order.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, total, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC) rank FROM (SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

customer_totals = orders.groupBy("customer_id").agg(sum("amount").alias("total"))
ranking_window = Window.orderBy(col("total").desc())

result = customer_totals.withColumn("rank", rank().over(ranking_window)).select("customer_id", "total", "rank")
